text:
Renko (レンコ, Renko) is an inhabitant of Meteor City's Kirimori Valley. She worked as an embalmer and was the mentor of at least two Spiders (Machi Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 397 and Pakunoda ) in the art of Nen.

Appearance

At the time of her appearance, Renko was a fairly slender woman with a petite build and long, light-colored hair. She wore a broad-brimmed hat with two horn-like ears sticking out from it as well as a completely black outfit; her black full-skirt knee-length dress has long sleeves covering up to her wrists, and also served as a mask that covered the lower half of her face, revealing only her eyes. 

Personality

Renko is mysterious and withdrawn, appearing at Sarasa's funeral and standing back quietly while the children mourn for their friend. While she seemed jealous of Machi's eyes and made a comment about precocious kids, she was willing to embalm Sarasa's body and offered Machi a way to learn Nen. 

Renko, as a Meteor City resident, was likely influenced by the conditions there, sharing remarkable bonds that have been described as "thinner than water, and yet thicker than blood". Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 102 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

After Sarasa's death, the children gather around her body lying in a casket at the church, calling her beautiful and saying that it's like she's still alive. Lisores tells them that it's called embalming, explaining that it's a technique used to restore and keep a person's body as close as possible to how it was when they were alive. He adds that it's a miracle that her body was able to be restored so well, given the condition it was in, asking them to thank the embalmer, Ms. Renko. Machi looks back to see a mysterious woman dressed in black with a large hat with pointed ears. 

She then approaches Renko and asks if she can learn to embalm like that, but Renko replies that she cannot, explaining that her technique is a special ability. Machi wonders if the ability has something to do with why her body is glowing so much, and Renko quickly asks if she can see aura. Machi stares at her with a determined look, and the jealous Renko comments on her pretty eyes. She then tosses Machi a small piece of paper with a specific design, explaining that she can visit anytime if the caretakers give her permission. She tells her to get on the last bus and ask for Kirimori Valley, adding that if she shows them the piece of paper, they will take her there for free. As Renko walks away, the word "aura" lingers in Machi's mind. 

Abilities & Powers

Because Renko was born in Meteor City, her existence is not recorded in any database, which makes obtaining information about her nearly impossible. 

Nen

Renko is a Nen user, as Machi was able to see her aura. She is a Specialist. She is skilled enough in Nen that she can mentor others.

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In the Volume 38 Extras, Renko has a conversation with Pakunoda about Pakunoda's Nen Limitations, revealing that Renko is a Specialist herself, and that she mentored Pakunoda in the art of Nen.
